zh.lifeSummary: 當Llywelyn ap Ieuan Llwyd於大約1270年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾康恩維爾-蓋奧時，他的父親Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin72歲，母親Margaret verch Rhys of Carmarthen40歲。他與Jonet verch Rhys Moethe在英國威爾斯結婚。他去世在英國威爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewelyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

en.lifeSummary: When Llywelyn ap Ieuan Llwyd was born about 1270, in Conwil-gaio, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin, was 72 and his mother, Margaret verch Rhys of Carmarthen, was 40. He married Jonet verch Rhys Moethe in Wales, United Kingdom. He died in Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Llywelyn ap Ieuan Llwyd est né environ 1270, à Conwil-gaio, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin, avait 72 ans et sa mère, Margaret verch Rhys of Carmarthen, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Jonet verch Rhys Moethe à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat in Wales, United Kingdom Jonet verch Rhys Moethe geheiratet. Er starb in Wales, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Llywelyn ap Ieuan Llwyd(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 콘윌-가이오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin(은)는 72세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret verch Rhys of Carmarthen(은)는 40세였다. 그는 영국 웨일스에서 Jonet verch Rhys Moethe(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 영국 웨일스에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Llywelyn ap Ieuan Llwyd родился около 1270 г. в местности конвил-геио, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin было 72 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret verch Rhys of Carmarthen, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Jonet verch Rhys Moethe в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. Он умер в местности Уэльс, Великобритания.
